identity.name: Wilson Souto
identity.description: Software Developer focused on delivering value by solving problems and building solutions

introduction: Software Developer focused on delivering value by solving problems and building solutions. Strong communication, continuous learning, and teamwork skills. Experience in technology consulting, AI, and finance — driving business success.

responsabilities: Developed and maintained systems for the Collateral OTC team, including collateral asset allocation and withdrawal, derivatives processing (swaps, options, NDFs), and margin and box calculations — handling over 28K daily trade positions.
Migrated 80% of legacy systems to .NET 8, refactoring into microservices and deploying on cloud infrastructure, significantly reducing system failures and increasing scalability and resilience.
Built and supported workflows for stocks, funds, government and corporate bonds, ensuring accurate collateral management and regulatory compliance across custodians.
Collaborated with operations to troubleshoot issues and prioritize demands by business impact, reducing bugs and optimizing collateral routines through continuous service improvements.
Developed AI-powered chatbots using ASP.NET Core and the OpenAI API to automate customer interactions for credit recovery operations, reducing manual outreach and streamlining collection workflows.
Built and maintained RESTful APIs integrating dialer platforms (Olos, Aspect) and client systems, enabling automated and reliable communication flows across the platform.
Optimized RabbitMQ message handling, eliminating dead-letter queue bottlenecks and significantly improving system responsiveness and reliability.

Maintained and optimized MySQL database operations to store and manage customer interaction data, including payment intentions, confirmations, and call outcomes — supporting the core revenue pipeline and processing 100K+ records per client monthly.

Developed an IBM Watson Assistant-powered chatbot integrated into a disguised pizzeria landing page, enabling domestic violence victims to discreetly request police assistance — turning a simulated order flow into a confidential emergency reporting system.
Built and maintained ASP.NET Core applications with C#, implementing CRUD operations and data management using SQL Server and Entity Framework Core.
Collaborated in Agile sprints, contributing to planning, execution, and code reviews while applying object-oriented principles in real-world projects.

education.degree: Associate's Degree in Systems Analysis and Development
